headline: Paychex AI Push Tests Client Stickiness As Stock Weakness Persists
summary: Paychex has introduced new AI driven features across its Paycor and Paychex Flex platforms, focused on automating scheduling, timesheet approvals, and payroll preparation. The company received 2026 Lighthouse Tech Awards for its small and midsize business HR technology solutions. These updates highlight Paychex's push to make everyday HR workflows more efficient for its business customers. For investors watching NasdaqGS:PAYX, the product story is evolving at a time when the share price...
